action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Snodgrass, Vining, Bare, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Hong, Joers, Johnson, Madison, Mayadev, McCarville, Miresse, Palmeri, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sinicki, Tenorio and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Cabral-Guevara, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer and Wirch
